rationale: The page contains a map titled 'Dutch Settlements in India' which lists various coastal settlements and the years associated with them. This is factual historical content regarding European expansion in India.
cleanedText:
NETHERLANDS/DUTCH
Map: Dutch Settlements in India
Settlements and associated years:
- Chinsura: (1625), (1653)
- Masulipatnam: (1598), (1616)
- Pulicat: (1600)
- Nagapatam: (1507), (1658)
- Jaffna: (1658)
- Trincomale: (1522), (1639), (1674), (1673)
- Matara: (1507), (1656)
- Galle: (1507), (1656)
- Colombo: (1505), (1656)
- Cochin: (1500), (1669)
Geographical Markers:
- Arabian Sea
- Bay of Bengal
